license_strategy: Original imaging-orientation synthesis supported by selected official public sources. Do not embed proprietary radiology appropriateness criteria, hospital protocols, or copyrighted radiology manuals without permission.

ORIGINAL-IMAGING-001.title: Original imaging orientation and radiology handoff framework

NCI-CT-001.title: NCI - Computed Tomography (CT) Scans and Cancer Fact Sheet

NIBIB-MRI-001.title: NIBIB - Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI)
NIBIB-MRI-001.organization: National Institute of Biomedical Imaging and Bioengineering

FDA-MQSA-001.title: FDA - Mammography Quality Standards Act and Program

CDC-STROKE-001.title: CDC - Signs and Symptoms of Stroke
CDC-STROKE-001.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention

NHLBI-MI-001.title: NHLBI - Heart Attack Symptoms
NHLBI-MI-001.organization: National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute

excluded_sources.title: Proprietary ACR Appropriateness Criteria copied verbatim
excluded_sources.reason: Not ingested to avoid copyright/licensing issues; use original routing synthesis and official public sources only.

excluded_sources.title: Hospital-specific prep protocols
excluded_sources.reason: Requires local authorization; runtime should defer to local imaging center instructions.

excluded_sources.title: Radiology report corpora with PHI
excluded_sources.reason: Do not ingest without de-identification, consent and governance.
